title: Set the Site Location
description: The globe fixes irradiance, temperature, tariff and currency for the design.

steps.title: Spin the globe
steps.description: Click your site, or search for it.
steps.voiceScript: Click your site on the globe. The marker turns green once it is set.
steps.captionText: Click your site on the globe. The marker turns green once it is set.
steps.fallbackMessage: Spin the globe: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Search instead
steps.description: Typing a place name flies the globe to it.
steps.voiceScript: You can also type a place name and the globe flies to it.
steps.captionText: You can also type a place name and the globe flies to it.
steps.fallbackMessage: Search instead: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Continue to loads
steps.description: Location fixes sun hours, temperature and tariff.
steps.voiceScript: Continue. Your location now fixes the sun hours, temperature and tariff.
steps.captionText: Continue. Your location now fixes the sun hours, temperature and tariff.
steps.fallbackMessage: Continue to loads: not visible on this screen yet.
